# Check current positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('b', 'R', 'Y', 'M', 'c'):
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"{n['color']}: row=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}], col=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
